request.prompt: Create and send an invoice to the customer Blueshore Ltd (org no. 987928921) for 40600 NOK excluding VAT. The invoice is for Maintenance.

content.text:
Today's date: 2026-03-19

Create and send an invoice to the customer Blueshore Ltd (org no. 987928921) for 40600 NOK excluding VAT. The invoice is for Maintenance.

I'll help you create and send an invoice to Blueshore Ltd. Let me break this down into steps:

1. First, check if the customer exists or create them
2. Create the invoice for maintenance services
3. Send the invoice

Let me start by checking if the customer exists:

Great! The customer Blueshore Ltd already exists with ID 107819126. Now I'll create the invoice for maintenance services. Since this is a service invoice for maintenance (not a product), I'll create the invoice directly with the amount specified.
I need to create an order first, then create an invoice from that order. Let me check the API documentation for creating orders:

content.content:
{"method":"POST","path":"/order","category":"order","summary":"Create order.","documentation":"#### `POST /order`

**Summary:** Create order.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Order`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperOrder`
"}

{"name":"Order","documentation":"### `Order`

Related orders. Only one order per invoice is supported at the moment.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `accountingDimensionValues` | Array<AccountingDimensionValue> |  | Free dimensions for the project connected to the order. (read-only) |
| `attachment` | Array<Document> |  | [BETA] Attachments belonging to this order (read-only) |
| `attn` | Contact |  |  |
| `canCreateBackorder` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `contact` | Contact |  |  |
| `currency` | Currency |  |  |
| `customer` | Customer |  |  |
| `customerName` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `deliveryAddress` | DeliveryAddress |  |  |
| `deliveryComment` | string |  |  |
| `deliveryDate` | string |  |  |
| `department` | Department |  |  |
| `discountPercentage` | number |  | Default discount percentage for order lines. |
| `displayName` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `invoiceComment` | string |  | Comment to be displayed in the invoice based on this order. Can be also found in Invoice.invoiceComm |
| `invoiceOnAccountVatHigh` | boolean |  | Is the on account(a konto) amounts including vat  |
| `invoiceSMSNotificationNumber` | string |  | The phone number of the receiver of sms notifications. Must be a norwegian phone number |
| `invoiceSendSMSNotification` | boolean |  | Is sms-notification on/off (read-only) |
| `invoicesDueIn` | integer |  | Number of days/months in which invoices created from this order is due |
| `invoicesDueInType` | string enum: ['DAYS', 'MONTHS', 'RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH'] |  | Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to  |
| `isClosed` | boolean |  | Denotes if this order is closed. A closed order can no longer be invoiced unless it is opened again. |
| `isPrioritizeAmountsIncludingVat` | boolean |  |  |
| `isShowOpenPostsOnInvoices` | boolean |  | Show account statement - open posts on invoices created from this order |
| `isSubscription` | boolean |  | If true, the order is a subscription, which enables periodical invoicing of order lines. First, crea |
| `isSubscriptionAutoInvoicing` | boolean |  | Automatic invoicing. Starts when the subscription is approved |
| `markUpOrderLines` | number |  | Set mark-up (%) for order lines. |
| `number` | string |  |  |
| `orderDate` | string |  |  |
| `orderGroups` | Array<OrderGroup> |  | Order line groups |
| `orderLineSorting` | string enum: ['ID', 'PRODUCT', 'PRODUCT_DESCENDING', 'CUSTOM'] |  |  |
| `orderLines` | Array<OrderLine> |  | Order lines tied to the order. New OrderLines may be embedded here, in some endpoints. |
| `ourContact` | Contact |  |  |
| `ourContactEmployee` | Employee |  |  |
| `overdueNoticeEmail` | string |  |  |
| `preliminaryInvoice` | Invoice |  |  |
| `project` | Project |  |  |
| `projectManagerNameAndNumber` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `receiverEmail` | string |  |  |
| `reference` | string |  |  |
| `sendMethodDescription` | string |  | Description of how this invoice will be sent |
| `status` | string enum: ['NOT_CHOSEN', 'NEW', 'CONFIRMATION_SENT', 'READY_FOR_PICKING', 'PICKED', 'PACKED', 'READY_FOR_SHIPPING', 'READY_FOR_INVOICING', 'INVOICED', 'CANCELLED'] |  | Logistics only |
| `subscriptionDuration` | integer |  | Number of months/years the subscription shall run |
| `subscriptionDurationType` | string enum: ['MONTHS', 'YEAR'] |  | The time unit of subscriptionDuration |
| `subscriptionInvoicingTime` | integer |  | Number of days/months invoicing in advance/in arrears |
| `subscriptionInvoicingTimeInAdvanceOrArrears` | string enum: ['ADVANCE', 'ARREARS'] |  | Invoicing in advance/in arrears |
| `subscriptionInvoicingTimeType` | string enum: ['DAYS', 'MONTHS'] |  | The time unit of subscriptionInvoicingTime |
| `subscriptionPeriodsOnInvoice` | integer |  | Number of periods on each invoice |
| `subscriptionPeriodsOnInvoiceType` | string enum: ['MONTHS'] |  | The time unit of subscriptionPeriodsOnInvoice (read-only) |
| `totalInvoicedOnAccountAmountAbsoluteCurrency` | number |  | Amount paid on account(a konto) (read-only) |
| `travelReports` | Array<TravelExpense> |  | Travel reports connected to the order. (read-only) |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
"}

content.text: Now let me check the OrderLine schema to understand how to create order lines:

content.content:
{"name":"OrderLine","documentation":"### `OrderLine`

| `inventory` | Inventory |  |  |
| `inventoryLocation` | InventoryLocation |  |  |
| `isCharged` | boolean |  | Flag indicating whether the order line is charged or not. |
| `isPicked` | boolean |  | Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents wh |
| `isSubscription` | boolean |  |  |
| `markup` | number |  | Markup given as a percentage (%) |
| `order` | Order |  |  |
| `orderGroup` | OrderGroup |  |  |
| `orderedQuantity` | number |  | Only used for Logistics customers who activated the Backorder functionality. Represents the quantity |
| `pickedDate` | string |  | Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents th |
| `product` | Product |  |  |
| `sortIndex` | integer |  | Defines the presentation order of the lines. Does not need to be, and is often not continuous. Only  |
| `subscriptionPeriodEnd` | string |  |  |
| `subscriptionPeriodStart` | string |  |  |
| `unitCostCurrency` | number |  | Unit price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the order's currency |
| `unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Unit price of purchase excluding VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit p |
| `unitPriceIncludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Unit price of purchase including VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit p |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `vatType` | VatType |  |  |
| `vendor` | Company |  |  |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
"}

content.text: Perfect! For maintenance services, I'll use the standard 25% VAT (ID 3). Now I'll create the order with the maintenance service line:
Great! The order has been created with ID 401950663. I notice it also created a preliminary invoice with ID 2147518518. Let me get the full order details to see the order lines:
Perfect! Now I need to create a proper invoice from this order. Let me create the invoice:

Perfect! Now that the bank account is set up, let me create the invoice again:
Excellent! The invoice has been created with ID 2147518527. Now I need to send it to the customer. Let me send the invoice via email:
Perfect! The invoice has been sent successfully. Let me verify the invoice details to confirm everything is correct:
